description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and bordered by hedges and trees. The structure features a flat and slightly angled roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows on one side, and a paved driveway leading to a garage. The front yard includes a stone pathway, landscaped greenery, and a small patio area. The building's exterior is primarily light-colored, with a mix of glass and concrete or stucco surfaces. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as multiple rooms and access points.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large windows, flat roof, and landscaped yard, featuring a driveway and open-plan interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, stone pathway, garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large floor-to-ceiling windows and the driveway extending to the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, hedge border, and the back entrance with visible interior rooms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angled roof, additional windows, and more of the surrounding greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped side windows
